channel.title: Nicotine Science and Policy
channel.description: Daily digest of views, debates and discussions on nicotine science, policy, regulation and advocacy.

item.title: Untethered | FDA’s Flavor Policy Defies Reality | RegWatch
item.description: The FDA’s flavour policy increasingly appears disconnected from how adult smokers actually switch away from cigarettes. Flavours are not just a youth issue — for many adults, they help make vaping a workable alternative to combustible tobacco. If regulation removes the products people find acceptable, it may weaken harm reduction while leaving cigarettes widely available. Public health policy should reflect real-world behaviour, not assumptions that ignore why switching succeeds. (Published on July 06, 2026byregulatorwatch.com)
